jp.title: ViVi国宝級イケメンランキング：SixTONES松村北斗が「ADULT部門」で首位 前人未踏の3部門殿堂入り 「僕をいいと思ってくれる人がいると思うと自信に繋がる」 2026年上半期のランキング発表
jp.description: 人気グループ「SixTONES（ストーンズ）」の松村北斗さんが、女性ファッション誌「ViVi（ヴィヴィ）」（講談社）の名物企画「ViVi国宝級イケメンランキング」の2026年上半期のランキングで、3…

jp.title: SixTONES松村北斗、「ViVi国宝級イケメンランキング」初の3部門殿堂入り達成「シンプルにうれしい」【一覧掲載】
jp.description: ニュース｜　6人組グループ・SixTONESの松村北斗が、23日発売のファッション雑誌『ViVi』9月号（講談社）で特集される人気企画「ViVi国宝級イケメンランキング」2026年上半期のADULT部門（30歳以上）で首位を獲得。主要3部門（NEXT（22歳以下）、NOW、ADULT）すべてで殿堂入りとなる同誌初のグランドスラムを達成した。　ADULT部門は、30歳以上が対象となり、過去には町田啓太、山田裕貴、坂口健太郎など、日本の名作を支える俳優たちが殿堂入りしてきた。松村は、2度目となる1位に輝いた。松村は、前例のない“国宝級グランドスラム”を達成した。

world.title: Nandi-Ndaitwah heads to SA for bilateral commission

world.title: Africa Urged to Invest in Cancer Experts
world.description: AFRICA has been urged to invest in training and retaining home-grown neuro-oncology specialists to tackle the growing burden of brain and spinal tumours and improve access to quality cancer care across the continent.

world.title: Travellers warned of methanol poisoning risks in new campaign
world.description: Holidaymakers are urged to understand the dangers and symptoms of methanol poisoning.

world.title: CEO Q&A with Kieran Daly, HealthBeacon
world.description: HealthBeacon Co-Founder Kieran Daly discusses digital health innovation, leadership, business growth, motivation and the future of home healthcare in this CEO Q&A.

world.title: Microsoft Fixes Record 600+ Vulnerabilities In July 2026 Patch Tuesday, Including Three Zero-Day Flaws
world.description: Microsoft has released its July 2026 Patch Tuesday security updates, delivering fixes for a record-breaking 622 vulnerabilities across Windows, Microsoft Office, SharePoint, Azure-related components, Visual Studio, and other products. The release marks the largest Patch Tuesday update in the company

world.title: A tragedy leaves Maine Democrats with less time to choose
world.description: Unlike some major news developments that provide a moment of political clarity, this situation resolves nothing. Instead, it raises the stakes for Democrats to make the right choice.

world.title: 'The Daily Show' reacts to Trump's blunt words about Lindsey Graham's cause of death
world.description: "Daily Show" host Michael Kosta has reacted to Trump sharing his thoughts on Lindsey Graham's cause of death.

world.title: PlayStation 3 emulator RPCS3 hits new milestone with 75% of its library now fully ‘Playable’
world.description: The leading PlayStation 3 emulator RPCS3 has reached another major milestone, with 75% of all PS3 games now being ‘Playable’.

world.title: Cabinet okays mobile phone manufacturing scheme with outlay of Rs 62,500 crore
world.description: The Union Cabinet on Wednesday approved a mobile phone manufacturing scheme with an outlay of Rs 62,500 crore.

world.title: Oil reserves eased Iran war price shock, but now they are 'spent', IMF says
world.description: The International Monetary Fund says the global economy was spared the worst of the oil price shock because of large reserves. Now they are running out.
